# merge_with_outputs (Function)

Takes a map of resource config entries and a map of module outputs (keyed by the same for_each keys). For each key, merges the config attributes with the output attributes (outputs take precedence on collision). Returns the merged map, suitable for use as a ref: resolution context layer.

## Signature

```text
merge_with_outputs(config Dynamic,outputs Dynamic) Dynamic
```

## Arguments

1. `config` (Dynamic, Unknownable) Map of resolved resource config entries (e.g. local.resource_groups).
1. `outputs` (Dynamic, Unknownable) Map of module outputs (e.g. module.resource_groups). Must have the same keys as config.
